RESET_COMPUTE_STARTUP_SA.description: Modify a stopped Compute Engine instance's service account, then start it to execute code as the target SA via the startup script.
RESET_COMPUTE_STARTUP_SA.example_command: gcloud compute instances set-service-account {resource} --service-account {target_sa} --zone ZONE && gcloud compute instances start {resource} --zone ZONE

START_COMPUTE_STARTUP_SA.description: Start a stopped Compute Engine instance already configured with the target SA to execute its startup script as that SA.
START_COMPUTE_STARTUP_SA.example_command: gcloud compute instances start {resource} --zone ZONE  # instance already runs as {target_sa}

CREATE_AND_INVOKE_CLOUDFUNCTION_AS_SA.description: Create and invoke a Cloud Function that runs as the target SA. Caller needs cloudfunctions.functions.create + iam.serviceAccounts.actAs.
CREATE_AND_INVOKE_CLOUDFUNCTION_AS_SA.example_command: gcloud functions deploy FUNC --service-account {target_sa} --runtime python312 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated && gcloud functions call FUNC

UPDATE_AND_INVOKE_CLOUDFUNCTION_AS_SA.description: Update an existing Cloud Function to use the target SA and invoke it. Caller needs cloudfunctions.functions.update + iam.serviceAccounts.actAs.
UPDATE_AND_INVOKE_CLOUDFUNCTION_AS_SA.example_command: gcloud functions deploy EXISTING_FUNC --service-account {target_sa} && gcloud functions call EXISTING_FUNC

CREATE_CLOUDSCHEDULER_JOB_AS_SA.description: Create a Cloud Scheduler job that calls a googleapis.com REST endpoint as the target SA. Caller needs cloudscheduler.jobs.create + iam.serviceAccounts.actAs on the target SA.

CREATE_CLOUDBUILD_AS_SA.description: Create a Cloud Build build pinned to the target SA. Caller needs cloudbuild.builds.create + iam.serviceAccounts.actAs on the target SA.

CREATE_CLOUDRUN_SERVICE_AS_SA.description: Deploy a Cloud Run service that runs as the target SA and exfiltrates its OAuth token. Caller needs run.services.create + iam.serviceAccounts.actAs on the target SA.

roles/owner.description: Collapsed dangerous-path edge for owner role grants (roles/owner). This edge collapses all matched dangerous rule edges for the same grant->target path. See dangerous_rule_names and dangerous_rule_descriptions on the edge for the individual rules that were collapsed.

roles/editor.description: Collapsed dangerous-path edge for editor role grants (roles/editor). This edge collapses all matched dangerous rule edges for the same grant->target path. See dangerous_rule_names and dangerous_rule_descriptions on the edge for the individual rules that were collapsed.
